WITH "seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210101 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210102 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210103 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210104 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210105 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0

  UNION

  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107 AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "distinct_pseudo_users_excluding_2day"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL;

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170325
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170330
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170331
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::STRING AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER AS "transaction_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') >= '2017-01-01'::DATE
    AND TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') < '2018-01-01'::DATE
    AND "totals":"totalTransactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "month",
    SUM("transaction_revenue") AS "monthly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "traffic_source",
    "month"
),
"traffic_source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    SUM("monthly_total_transaction_revenue") AS "annual_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "monthly_revenue"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
),
"top_traffic_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source"
  FROM "traffic_source_totals"
  ORDER BY "annual_total_transaction_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  t."traffic_source",
  ROUND(
    (MAX(m."monthly_total_transaction_revenue") - MIN(m."monthly_total_transaction_revenue")) / 1000000,
    2
  ) AS "difference_in_millions"
FROM "top_traffic_source" t
JOIN "monthly_revenue" m
  ON t."traffic_source" = m."traffic_source"
GROUP BY t."traffic_source"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "feb_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170202
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170217
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170218
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170219
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170224
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN(TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "transaction_date",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_type",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
      ORDER BY "visitStartTime", "visitId"
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  WHERE COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1
),
"first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "transaction_date",
    "device_type"
  FROM "transaction_sessions"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
)
SELECT
  "ft"."fullVisitorId",
  DATEDIFF('day', "fv"."first_visit_date", "ft"."transaction_date") AS "days_elapsed",
  "ft"."device_type"
FROM "first_transaction" AS "ft"
INNER JOIN "first_visit" AS "fv"
  ON "ft"."fullVisitorId" = "fv"."fullVisitorId"
ORDER BY "ft"."fullVisitorId"

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    "hits" AS "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-01-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-06-30')
),
"base" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."session_date",
    "s"."source",
    "p".value:"productRevenue"::FLOAT AS "product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "h",
    LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "h".value:"product") AS "p"
  WHERE "p".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "source"
  FROM "base"
  GROUP BY "source"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM("product_revenue") DESC) = 1
),
"daily" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "b"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "b"."source" = "ts"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "b"."session_date")
),
"weekly" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "b"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "b"."source" = "ts"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "b"."session_date")
),
"monthly" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "b"."session_date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") / 1000000 AS "product_revenue_millions"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "ts"
    ON "b"."source" = "ts"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "b"."session_date")
)
SELECT
  "ts"."source",
  (SELECT MAX("product_revenue_millions") FROM "daily") AS "max_daily_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("product_revenue_millions") FROM "weekly") AS "max_weekly_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("product_revenue_millions") FROM "monthly") AS "max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "ts";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
